text.name: em_employee_empty
text.text: Select an employee to see details.

text.name: em_dialog_hire_yes_no
text.text: Are you sure you want to hire %s?

text.name: em_dialog_fire_yes_no
text.text: Are you sure you want to fire %s?

text.name: em_menu_instruction
text.text: Use the controls to manage employees and workflows.

text.name: em_error_no_tasks
text.text: Please add at least one task to the queue.

text.name: em_error_no_hired
text.text: No hired employees. Hire someone first!

text.name: em_workflow_start_failed
text.text: Failed to start workflow for %s (check vehicle/equipment).

text.name: em_error_equipment_failed
text.text: %s: Equipment check failed for %s. Detach incompatible tools or check store availability.

text.name: em_workflow_saved_hint
text.text: Workflow saved for %s. Will auto-start at shift begin.

text.name: em_workflow_queue_complete
text.text: All tasks completed for %s. Workflow paused.

text.name: em_field_empty
text.text: You don't own any fields yet.

text.name: em_vehicle_empty
text.text: You don't own any vehicles yet.

text.name: em_training_fail_cooldown
text.text: Training on cooldown. Wait a few days.

text.name: em_payroll_failed
text.text: Not enough money to pay employees! They will stop working.

text.name: em_unpaid_warning
text.text: Unpaid - refuses to work until paid

text.name: em_bio_default
text.text: A reliable worker with a passion for farming.

text.name: em_personality_methodical
text.text: Methodical and precise. Follows procedures to the letter and rarely makes mistakes.

text.name: em_personality_curious
text.text: Naturally curious and eager to learn. Always asking questions and trying new techniques.

text.name: em_personality_bold
text.text: Bold and fearless. Takes risks but gets the job done fast.

text.name: em_personality_patient
text.text: Patient and calm under pressure. Never rushes, always delivers quality work.

text.name: em_personality_dedicated
text.text: Deeply dedicated to the farm. First to arrive, last to leave.

text.name: em_exp_tractor_veteran
text.text: Years of tractor experience across various terrain types and weather conditions.

text.name: em_exp_harvest_specialist
text.text: Specialized in harvest operations, from timing to combine optimization.

text.name: em_exp_speed_driver
text.text: Known for fast field coverage, though sometimes at the expense of precision.

text.name: em_exp_mechanic
text.text: Strong mechanical background. Can troubleshoot and maintain most farm equipment.

text.name: em_exp_crop_expert
text.text: Deep knowledge of crop cycles, soil conditions, and optimal planting times.

text.name: em_exp_newcomer
text.text: Fresh to farming but eager to prove their worth on the field.

text.name: em_exp_allrounder
text.text: Jack of all trades. Comfortable with any task thrown their way.

text.name: em_bio_dupont
text.text: Third-generation farmer from Normandy. Grew up surrounded by apple orchards and dairy cattle.

text.name: em_bio_lefebvre
text.text: Agricultural school graduate with honors. Fascinated by sustainable farming practices.

text.name: em_bio_moreau
text.text: Former rally driver who found peace in the countryside. Still drives tractors like race cars.

text.name: em_bio_bernard
text.text: Mechanical engineer who left the city for a simpler life. Can fix anything with two wrenches.

text.name: em_bio_petit
text.text: Young hotshot fresh from driving school. Eager to prove himself behind any wheel.

text.name: em_bio_roux
text.text: Patient and steady. Grew up helping her grandparents on their vineyard in Bordeaux.

text.name: em_bio_garnier
text.text: Veteran harvester with two decades of experience. Knows every grain by sight.

text.name: em_bio_faure
text.text: Former accountant turned farmer. Manages every franc with surgical precision.

text.name: em_bio_girard
text.text: Self-taught mechanic who can rebuild a tractor engine blindfolded. Quiet but brilliant.

text.name: em_bio_andre
text.text: Tech-savvy young farmer. Dreams of bringing modern precision to traditional agriculture.

text.name: em_bio_leroy
text.text: Fresh out of school with stars in his eyes. What he lacks in skill he makes up in enthusiasm.

text.name: em_bio_simon
text.text: Daughter of a famous breeder. Determined to build her own reputation in crop farming.

text.name: em_bio_laurent
text.text: Calm and collected. Spent years managing a cooperative before going independent.

text.name: em_bio_michel
text.text: The backbone of every team she joins. Twenty years of experience and still going strong.

text.name: em_bio_martinez
text.text: Crossed the Pyrenees to find better opportunities. Brings Spanish passion to French fields.

text.name: em_bio_dubois
text.text: Precision is her middle name. Former quality inspector at an agricultural equipment factory.

text.name: em_bio_fontaine
text.text: Enthusiastic learner who devours farming manuals. Already impressive for his age.

text.name: em_bio_mercier
text.text: Free spirit who works hard and plays hard. Don't let the smile fool you.

text.name: em_bio_blanchard
text.text: Old-school farmer who trusts instinct over technology. His fields are always impeccable.

text.name: em_bio_chevalier
text.text: Competitive by nature. Set the regional harvest speed record two years running.

text.name: em_quote_dupont
text.text: A good farmer reads the land like a book.

text.name: em_quote_moreau
text.text: Speed is a skill, not a fault.

text.name: em_quote_bernard
text.text: If it's broken, I can fix it. If it works, I can make it better.

text.name: em_quote_petit
text.text: Give me the keys and watch me go!

text.name: em_quote_garnier
text.text: Twenty years of dust on my boots and I wouldn't change a thing.

text.name: em_quote_faure
text.text: Every seed is an investment. Track them wisely.

text.name: em_quote_girard
text.text: A well-maintained machine never lets you down.

text.name: em_quote_andre
text.text: Technology is the future of farming.

text.name: em_quote_leroy
text.text: I'm new, but I learn fast. Just watch.

text.name: em_quote_simon
text.text: I'll build my own legacy, one field at a time.

text.name: em_quote_laurent
text.text: Steady hands make for a steady harvest.

text.name: em_quote_michel
text.text: Experience can't be rushed. It's earned, season by season.

text.name: em_quote_martinez
text.text: I bring the fire. The field brings the rest.

text.name: em_quote_mercier
text.text: Work hard, play hard, harvest harder.

text.name: em_quote_blanchard
text.text: The land remembers those who treat it well.

text.name: em_quote_chevalier
text.text: Records are made to be broken.
